items.name: qti-attributes-panel
items.title: QTI Attributes Panel
items.description: A panel component that displays and edits attributes of the selected QTI node and its ancestors.

items.name: qti-composer
items.title: QTI Composer
items.description: Displays composed QTI XML from item context. Shows formatted XML output with download link.

items.name: qti-composer-metadata-form
items.title: QTI Composer Metadata Form
items.description: A form for editing QTI item metadata (title, identifier).

items.name: qti-code-panel
items.title: QTI Code Panel
items.description: A panel that displays editor document as HTML, JSON, or XML. Listens to code update events from the qtiCodePanelExtension.
